title: Vendor Metric ID
description: Identifier for a vendor-defined metric within the vendor's vocabulary. Stable lookup key; the vendor publishes the canonical list (with category, methodology, and standard alignment) in `brand.json` `agents[type='measurement']`. Lowercase with underscores so a future enum promotion into `available-metric.json` is a literal string lift. Identifier is namespaced by the vendor — the same `metric_id` may mean different things in different vendors' vocabularies.
